title: begonia hydrocotylifolia
intro: Begonia hydrocotylifolia, also known as Spiranthes, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Begonia hydrocotylifolia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of rheumatism. The plant is often prepared as a herbal decoction or infused in water to extract its medicinal properties, which are also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
